questions.clue: In 1953 this "Nightline" host moved with his family from England to the U.S.

Shallow, saline Lake Eyre is this continent's lowest point

From the Latin word for blood, it means blood-colored or cheerfully optimistic

final.clue: This 1990 winner is the most recent to win the Best Director Oscar for his directorial debut
